description: Use this API to delete the specified FACTS device from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purgfacts(fd)

parameters.name: fd
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device to be removed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
